originalTitle: Live RL Research on PufferLib w/ Joseph Suarez
title: Debugging Gradient Numerical Issues in PufferLib Custom Kernels
summary: Debugged numerical inaccuracies in custom gradient kernels for Puffer 4, specifically fixing a missing clipped gradient in the policy loss and attempting to resolve entropy gradient discrepancies. Achieved stable training with near-perfect policy loss gradient agreement but the entropy gradient remained slightly off.
